title: stachys nubilorum
intro: Stachys nubilorum, also known as dust miller or woolly hedge nettle, is a perennial plant species native to China, belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae). It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is valued for its potential health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and supporting digestive health. Stachys nubilorum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, allowing for its medicinal properties to be effectively utilized.
